home.title: Talk to Great Minds
home.subtitle: Click Chat to consult one-on-one, or tap + to build a roundtable

chat.noMessages: Try a question below, or type your own
chat.shareTooLong: Conversation too long to share via URL
chat.enterPassword: Set a password to protect API keys (leave empty to exclude keys)
chat.enterDecryptPassword: Enter password to decrypt settings (leave empty to skip keys)
chat.corsError: Request blocked by browser (CORS). A proxy is needed.
chat.characterPromptPlaceholder: Describe how this character thinks and responds...

settings.title: Settings
settings.thinkingLevelHint: Model reasons deeper before answering. More accurate but slower and uses more tokens.
settings.corsProxyHint: Routes requests through a proxy to bypass browser CORS restrictions
settings.customBaseUrlHint: Enter your OpenAI-compatible API endpoint, e.g. https://api.example.com/v1
